name: ASUS B850M MAX GAMING WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 10Gbps Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek GbE LAN - 802.11ax 1x1 Wi-Fi 6 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: ASUS B850M MAX GAMING WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x
description: ASUS micro-ATX gaming motherboard for AM5 socket supporting DDR5 with Wi-Fi 6 and multiple M.2 slots.
